title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Orient Electric is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
